meaning: Global Network Navigator 全球网络导航器
examples: In addition, a new accelerating genetic operator was introduced to improve the convergence of GNN.
In this paper, the function approximation of Gelenbe Neural Network (GNN) is discussed and it is proved that GNN can approximate any G-type polynomial by using constructional method.
The designers of both Mosaic and Netscape Navigator have pointed at GNN as their inspiration.
In the autumn of 1993, O'Reilly launched Global Network Navigator (GNN), an on-line magazine and Internet reference guide.
O'Reilly had promised to distribute GNN for free, so an online magazine, with the first online advertising, was wrapped around the catalog.
